title: Conquest Of Hunterra Modpack
description: This modpack is built around the idea of turning minecraft into a fully fleshed out fantasy RPG
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d7b844478683f4aea09c801c5b834029c272dd6.png)
The Conquest Of Hunterra modpack is designed for the Conquest of Hunterra server, It can be used alone but is not recommended. This mod is very MP focused and would be incredible hard and slow to play alone. 

players will start off selecting a Class from our custom Origins list.

The classes will give you stats in for Levelz, these stats will unlock the ability to craft
and use certain items. Make sure to select a job in the jobsaddon tab, its right beside the 
LevelZ menu in the inventory screen. You can have a max of 2 jobs at one time and the cool down starts after selecting 1 so make sure to wait to start your second job.

as you level up you will unlock armors, from epic knights, cooking equipment from Farmers delight and brewin and chewin, waystones from the waystones mod and much much more. you can see what is unlocked by clicking on the stat icon in the levelz menu.

Also dont be scared if all this sounds hard, even peaceful builders can survive, we have a builders job that will provide XP for building with including all the Conquest reforged blocks.

Travel the world in a galley or brig from the small ships mod! or decorate a horse with banner covered armour and tow around a wagon from nifty carts!

In the future We plan to host events that fit the medieval/light fantasy them and hope you will join us! 



Once you download the modpack make sure to increase the memory in the settings before launching. We recommend 6-8GB![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ba5b7bdc677107f4bf723318a44c24af5c0e385.png)!
